name: ExtensionSubstanceDefinition_Grade
title: R5: The quality standard, established benchmark, to which substance complies (e.g. USP/NF, BP) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceDefinition.grade` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceDefinition.grade` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubstanceDefinition.grade` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `SubstanceDefinition.grade` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceDefinition.grade` has a context of SubstanceSpecification based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SubstanceSpecification`.
Element `SubstanceDefinition.grade` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The quality standard, established benchmark, to which substance complies (e.g. USP/NF, BP) (new)
